## Table 1: Meat_and_Dairy_Production (14,382 rows × 4 columns)

### Description
Data loaded from CSV file: 7.csv (Dataset: Meat and Dairy Production)

### Schema (4 fields)
  - Country -- type: object, values: Afghanistan, Africa, Africa (FAO), Albania, Algeria, ..., World, Yemen, Yugoslavia, Zambia, Zimbabwe
  - Code -- type: object, values: 0, AFG, AGO, ALB, ARE, ..., WSM, YEM, ZAF, ZMB, ZWE
  - Year -- type: int64, values: 1961, 1962, 1963, 1964, 1965, ..., 2018, 2019, 2020, 2021, 2022
  - Meat, total | 00001765 || Production | 005510 || tonnes -- type: float64, values: 0.0, 5.11, 5.86, 6.02, 14.92, ..., 338109200.0, 338912200.0, 341013630.0, 354536580.0, 360617700.0

### Sample Data (first 5 rows)

questions: How has total meat production changed over time for individual countries?
